title: Improve proxy to open all websites and make TikTok work

requirements.text: Expand the CORS proxy fallback chain in `useTabs.ts` and `TabContent.tsx` to maximize the number of sites that successfully load in iframes. Add the following additional proxies to the rotation after the existing ones: `https://api.codetabs.com/v1/proxy?quest=<url>`, `https://thingproxy.freeboard.io/fetch/<url>`, and `https://yacdn.org/proxy/<url>`. Attempt each proxy in sequence and only show the error/fallback state after all proxies have been exhausted.

quotes: make all websites open when searched

acceptanceCriteria: The proxy fallback chain in useTabs.ts includes at least 5 proxy options tried in sequence.
When one proxy URL fails (iframe error event or timeout), the next proxy is automatically attempted.
The error state is only shown after all proxy options have failed.
Existing proxy order (allorigins.win first, corsproxy.io second, cors-anywhere third) is preserved as the first three attempts.

requirements.text: For TikTok (tiktok.com) specifically, implement a dedicated handling strategy in `useTabs.ts` and `TabContent.tsx`. When the URL being loaded matches `tiktok.com` (or `www.tiktok.com`), use an embedded `<iframe>` with `src` set to `https://www.tiktok.com/embed/` as the primary attempt, and also try the full proxy chain using `https://tiktok.com` as the target. Additionally, in `QuickOpen.tsx`, update the TikTok card's URL to use `https://www.tiktok.com` and add a note in the error fallback state that links directly to `https://www.tiktok.com` with `target="_blank"` for cases where embedding is blocked by TikTok's own X-Frame-Options headers.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the TikTok card in QuickOpen opens a tab that attempts to load TikTok via proxy.
If direct proxy embedding fails, the TikTok embed URL (https://www.tiktok.com/embed/) is tried as a fallback.
If all embedding attempts fail, the error state displays a clearly visible direct link to https://www.tiktok.com that opens in a new browser tab.
The TikTok card in QuickOpen.tsx uses https://www.tiktok.com as its URL.

requirements.text: Add a per-tab retry mechanism in `TabContent.tsx`. When the error state is displayed (all proxies exhausted), show a 'Try Again' button that re-initiates the full proxy fallback chain for the current URL. Also add a 'Open in New Window' button that opens the raw (non-proxied) URL directly in a new browser tab via `window.open(url, '_blank')`.

quotes: make all websites open when searched

acceptanceCriteria: Error state in TabContent shows a 'Try Again' button that re-attempts all proxies from the beginning.
Error state shows an 'Open in New Window' button that calls window.open with the original URL and '_blank' target.
Both buttons are styled consistently with the amethyst/purple theme and have neon glow hover states.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not add any backend logic; this is a frontend-only change.
Preserve the existing proxy order: allorigins.win → corsproxy.io → cors-anywhere as the first three attempts.
nonGoals: Implementing a real server-side proxy backend.
Guaranteeing that sites with strict X-Frame-Options or CSP headers (e.g., TikTok) will embed successfully — only best-effort proxy attempts are in scope.
Changes to the AI Assistant, Code Editor, Presentation Builder, or Games pages.
Adding new navigation destinations or pages.
